title: The Mad Hatter
description: Submission for Neoforge 1.21.1. Adds a magical hat that can store near-endless items and retrieve them.
body:
This mod is ported from **Miyucomic's [The Mad Hatter](https://modrinth.com/mod/hattened)**. Thanks to Miyucomics for the creativity!

You can now experience this mod in neoforge1.21.1!

A simple magician's hat with infinite storage, cool animations, a vacuuming and ejecting system, themed after cards, and containing confetti!

In your inventory, it works similar to a bundle. You can place items in and take items out. You can then right-click it to put it on your head, or press H by default to take it off.

Once you wear the hat, you can access a special mode by holding Left Alt by default. Hold right-click or walk into items while in this mode to pick them up into the hat, and left-click to rapid-fire shoot them out. You can also press middle-click to shoot confetti.

This mod have added three additional events, HatThrowItemEvent and HatVacuumItemEvent, and HatConfettiEvent. You can cancel the event and conjure up a pigeon from inside.(But this mod didn't add pigeons)

If encounter bugs, please give feedback to the mod author instead of going to the original author.


这个模组是从**Miyucomic's [The Mad Hatter](https://modrinth.com/mod/hattened)**移植而来的.感谢Miyucomics的创造力！

你现在可以在neoforge1.21.1中体验这个模组！

一顶简单的魔术师帽，有无限的存储空间、酷炫的动画、吸尘和弹出系统、主题卡片和五彩纸屑！
在你的储存中，它的工作方式类似于背包。您可以放入和取出物品。然后，您可以右键单击它将其戴在头上，或者默认情况下按H将其取下。
戴上帽子后，默认情况下按住左Alt键可以进入特殊模式。在此模式下，按住鼠标右键或走进物品，将它们捡起放在帽子里，然后单击鼠标左键快速射击。您也可以按鼠标中键发射五彩纸屑。

此模组额外添加了三个事件，吸入取出和放烟花，你可以取消事件并从里面变出一只鸽子。（但是这个模组没有添加鸽子）

如果你遇到bug请向此模组作者反馈而不是去找原作者。
